text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Osaka Hai, an excellent predictor of how
things will turn out in a year, is about to begin.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That okonomiyaki last night sure was tasty, wasn't
it?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I even got to cut up your food and serve it to
you...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's given me a much-needed boost of energy! I
feel like I can pull it off today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Somehow, Super Creek draws strength not from
food but from doing her best for others.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yo! I'm lettin' myself in, Creek!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Um... Are you scheduled to race today?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nah! Just droppin' in to check up on ya. Wanted
to see how you're doin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Next up is your big battle against yours truly. Just
get through this and come at me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'll be waitin' for ya at the Spring-Ten!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Do you mean tempura spring rolls? Is that a
famous Osaka dish?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No! The spring Tenno Sho! Races are for runnin',
not for jokin'! Ya better be serious on race day!
